entry_condition: Close price crosses above Upper Bollinger Band(20,2)
exit_condition: Close price crosses below Middle Bollinger Band(20) OR after 10 days

entry_condition: MACD line crosses above Signal line AND MACD histogram increasing
exit_condition: MACD line crosses below Signal line OR after 15 days

entry_condition: Price > EMA(7) > EMA(14) > EMA(21) AND increasing volume
Price breaks above 90-day resistance level with volume spike
exit_condition: Price drops below recent support OR trailing stop hit

entry_condition: Price reaches below weekly S1 pivot AND oversold on 4h timeframe
exit_condition: Price reaches weekly pivot OR 3 days pass

entry_condition: Opening gap down > 1% from previous close
exit_condition: Gap fills OR end of day

entry_condition: Price breaks above upper channel line of 20-day Donchian Channel
exit_condition: Price falls below middle channel line OR 10 days pass

entry_condition: VWAP crosses above MACD signal line
exit_condition: VWAP crosses below MACD signal line

entry_condition: New 5-day low after a downtrend AND RSI(2) < 15
Price above Kumo cloud AND Tenkan-sen crosses above Kijun-sen
exit_condition: Price below Kumo cloud OR Tenkan-sen crosses below Kijun-sen
